step1.title: Step 1: Select class
step1.description: Choose the class you will compete in at this regatta.
step1.multiCrewHint: This boat has {count} sailor(s). You must enter at least the helm; the rest can be added now or later.

step2Crew.title: Crew members
step2Crew.description: You can add more crew members (up to {count} in total). Each with position Skipper or Crew.
step2Crew.addCrewBelow: Add crew members below if the boat has more than one sailor.

step3.title: Step 3: Boat details
step3.description: Information about the boat you will compete with.

summary.submittingDescription: Please wait while we process your registration and send your confirmation email. Do not close this page or click submit again.

public.closedDescription: Online entries are currently disabled for this regatta.
public.linkUnavailableDescription: This event is configured to use an external form, but no link is currently available.
public.externalDescription: This event uses an external form for registration.

errors.atLeastOneCrew: At least one crew member is required for this class.
errors.reviewForm: Please review the form and try again.

notifications.waitingListDescription: Your entry was received, but the championship limit was reached. You have been placed on the waiting list.
notifications.duplicateDescription: This sail number is already registered in this class. If you already submitted, check your email for confirmation.
notifications.errorDescription: Something went wrong while submitting. Please try again.

hints.boatName: Official name or how the boat is known
hints.sailNumber: Digits only — country is selected above (e.g. 30275)

entryList.title: Entry List
entryList.noEntries: There are no entries for this class yet.

orgHome.defaultHeroSubtitle: Track, participate and follow the world of sailing competitions.

ptl.loadFailed: Failed to load protest time limits.

resultsPublic.noRaceResults: No results for this race yet.

calendarPage.title: Calendar
calendarPage.subtitle: Browse regattas by month and year.

hero.title: Run Better Regattas with Faster Scoring and Clearer Operations
hero.lead: SailScore helps clubs and race teams handle setup, entries, scoring, notices, and results in one structured workflow.

platform.title: One platform, six practical capabilities
platform.intro: Organize race office operations from setup to publishing with one connected workflow.
platform.module1Desc: Create regattas, define classes, schedules, and core settings in minutes.
platform.module2Desc: Centralize online entries and participant records with cleaner validation.
platform.module3Desc: Support race-day scoring teams with fast updates and clear controls.
platform.module4Desc: Publish race and overall standings quickly with consistent visibility.
platform.module5Desc: Keep official notices and hearing decisions in one trusted channel.
platform.module6Desc: Each sailor account has its own dashboard to file protests, scoring enquiries, requests, and more.

publicLook.title: Example look for each regatta's public website
publicLook.description: Each event can have a clean public-facing page with key details, notice board access, and results visibility for sailors, coaches, and visitors.
publicLook.imageAlt: Public regatta website preview showing event home page

entriesSpotlight.title: Centralized entry management
entriesSpotlight.description: Keep all entries organized in one place, with class filters, status indicators, and clean validation to prevent duplicates and missing data.

features.title: Everything needed to run a regatta, in one platform
features.card1Desc: Configure events, classes, schedules, and settings with clear admin control.
features.card2Desc: Collect and organize sailor and boat data in one flow.
features.card3Desc: Support scorers with race-day tools built for speed and accuracy.
features.card4Desc: Publish race and overall standings with confidence.
features.card5Desc: Centralize notices, decisions, and updates in one official channel.
features.card6Desc: Give admins, scorers, and sailors the right visibility.

scoringSpotlight.title: A faster scoring workflow
scoringSpotlight.description: Score race input quickly with a structured race-day flow that reduces manual steps and keeps your team aligned.

benefits.title: Why teams choose SailScore
benefits.card1Desc: Reduce manual steps and move from race input to published standings quickly.
benefits.card2Desc: Keep notices, updates, and protest communications in one visible place.
benefits.card3Desc: Standardize setup, entries, and race-office tasks across events.
benefits.card4Desc: Keep your organization's visual identity and participant context.
benefits.card5Desc: Give sailors and coaches clear access to updates and results.
benefits.card6Desc: Use practical tools designed for real race-day conditions.

noticeSpotlight.title: Official communication, in one place
noticeSpotlight.description: Publish notices, hearing decisions, and updates in a single trusted channel that sailors and coaches can rely on.

socialProof.title: Designed for real sailing events
socialProof.intro: From club races to championship weekends, SailScore gives organisers one place to manage entries, scoring, notices, results and event administration.

personas.title: Built for every role in race operations
personas.adminDesc: Manage setup, classes, branding, and visibility from one control point.
personas.scorersDesc: Work faster on race day with a cleaner scoring and publishing flow.
personas.sailorsDesc: Follow entries, notices, and standings in one consistent public view.

valueProp.title: When race day gets busy, operations should stay clear
valueProp.p1: Many regattas still run on disconnected tools, manual updates, and scattered communication. That slows scoring and delays final results.
valueProp.p2: SailScore brings the full process into one system, so your team can move faster, stay aligned, and publish accurate outcomes with confidence.

resultsSpotlight.title: Publish trusted standings, fast
resultsSpotlight.description: Race and overall standings are presented clearly for sailors and coaches, with consistent formatting across every event.

howItWorks.title: Simple workflow, from setup to final results
howItWorks.step1Desc: Set classes, schedules, roles, and operational rules.
howItWorks.step2Desc: Manage entries, scoring, and official communication in real time.
howItWorks.step3Desc: Release clear race and overall results to sailors and coaches quickly.

faq.title: Quick answers
faq.q1: Is SailScore only for large regattas?
faq.a1: No. It works for local club events and larger multi-class regattas.
faq.q2: Can we keep our current workflow?
faq.a2: Yes. SailScore supports practical race-office processes and improves them gradually.
faq.q3: Can sailors and coaches view updates clearly?
faq.a3: Yes. Results and official communications are centralized for better visibility.
faq.q4: Can we use our club branding?
faq.a4: Yes. SailScore supports organization-specific visual identity in key areas.

cta.title: Ready for a more organized and faster race day?
cta.description: See how SailScore fits your regatta workflow and helps your team deliver clear, trusted results.
cta.microcopy: No hard sell — just a practical walkthrough.

footer.tagline: Questions from clubs and race organisers — get in touch by email or phone.
